name: blockplan
description: BlockPlan task-block scheduler for web, Windows, and Android.

scripts.android:sync: pnpm run prepare:web && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: pnpm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:build:debug: pnpm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check scripts/prepare-web-dist.mjs && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs
